Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-31-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

David J. Cook, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION,
No appearance by defaulted defendant GINA MARIE GREGORI AKA GINA M. GREGORI AKA GINA GREGORI, AN INDIVIDUAL,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

Witness: Donna Mandell sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $166,931.88
Pre-Judgment Interest: $2377.96
Attorney's Fees: $6,468.75
Costs: $195.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $175,973.59

Judgment signed in open court.
